package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryReturnsHttpStatusErrors() string {
    ruleID := "repository_returns_http_status_errors"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repositories that construct transport-layer error objects or status-code wrappers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
